title: Choosing subitems from multiple parent items
excerpt: Enable choosing subitems from multiple parent items in to be able to delete or change multiple subitems at once

posts.author: NytaiK (Nytai Kayni)
posts.cookedHtml: Enable choosing subitems from multiple parent items in to be able to delete or change multiple subitems at once

posts.author: Shaun-Sparks (Shaun Sparks)
posts.cookedHtml:
This program has worked wonders for our organization but I feel as though there are some things that can be streamlined or modified to increase efficiency and accuracy.
I have been using monday.com for many things but my newest project is running a high level accruals board to track cost for each job/event. I have been utilizing subitems to list by billable items. Under the sub items am selecting a start date/time with an end date/time which then total hours is determined. I cant tell you the hours it would save me being able to select 30-50 subitems under different items and be able to change them to all the same start and end time. This project incorporates 8 boards with many custom integrations and sub items play a large roll in its success.

Is this something that is eventually possible to accomplish?

posts.author: Simona (Simona Omidkar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

unfortunately it is currently not possible to have the batch selection of subitems analogue to batch selection on item basis.
We work for example with

Items = Channel
Subitems = Calendar Week

If everything is setup, we want to make a batch selection of all subitems and set them to done, instead of clicking through every item.

Would be great to put that on your roadmap!
Thanks

image693×637 38.6 KB

posts.author: africanubora (Belle Niba)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m surprised this “select all” feature for subitems was not included by default.

I love the flexibility they’ve just released for the subitem feature but having to select things one at a time to make a batch update for subitems is quite ridiculous. I hope this gets added soon. It will save time on some cumbersome activities.

posts.author: sistemas.arquiara (Diana P Murcia R)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m still watting, I hope it gets add it to the roadmap!

posts.author: anthonywoods (Anthony Woods)
posts.cookedHtml:
I completely agree with the sentiments in this thread.

Having the ability to selected multiple fields (such as dates, time and status) within different parent items and their sub items to amend or delete should have been included as part of the sub items release.

This feature request only has 6 votes (so far) and therefore I think it will be highly unlikely this will be considered. I’m bumping this thread to see if other users are having similar problems.

posts.author: kasperhusted (Kasper Husted)
posts.cookedHtml: I just spent 30 mins.+ manually updating a bunch of subitems with the exact same data. I really wish I could have added them with on batch action, and spent that time on something else.
